hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Wademac Arusha Inn Hotel in Arusha offers family rooms with private bathrooms, balconies, and garden or mountain views. Each room includes a work desk, TV, and free WiFi.
Dining and Leisure: Guests can enjoy a sun terrace, garden, restaurant, and bar. The family-friendly restaurant serves African and barbecue grill cuisines with vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free options. Live music and cooking classes enhance the dining experience.
Convenient Location: Located 13 km from Arusha Airport, the hotel is near attractions such as Old German Boma and Njiro Complex, each 7 km away. Free on-site parking and a tour desk provide added convenience.

hotels.description_en:
Elegant Accommodation: Villa Arumeru in Arusha offers a lodge with a swimming pool, sun terrace, and lush garden. Guests enjoy free WiFi, a restaurant, and massage services.
Comfortable Amenities: The property features family rooms, a pool bar, and outdoor seating areas. Additional amenities include a hot tub, terrace, balcony, and private bathrooms with free toiletries.
Dining Options: Breakfast options include continental, vegetarian, and vegan. The restaurant serves a variety of cuisines, and evening entertainment provides live music.
Local Attractions: Located 4 km from Arusha Airport, Villa Arumeru is near Uhuru Monument (6 km) and Old German Boma (7 km). Other attractions include Njiro Complex (12 km) and Meserani Snake Park (24 km).

hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Mount Meru Game Lodge in Arusha offers family rooms with private bathrooms, free WiFi, and amenities such as a work desk and patio. Each room includes a shower and free toiletries.
Leisure Facilities: Guests can relax in the year-round outdoor swimming pool, sun terrace, and lush garden. The property features a spa, outdoor fireplace, and outdoor seating area.
Dining Experience: The family-friendly restaurant serves African cuisine with brunch, lunch, and dinner. Breakfast options include continental, buffet, and full English/Irish.
Activities and Location: Located 27 km from Arusha Airport, the lodge is near attractions like Mount Meru (30 km) and Ngurdoto Crater (14 km). Guests enjoy walking tours and cycling.
